data.name: Sex of Thrones 2 👑
data.detailed_description:
Sex of Thrones 2 takes you to the frozen North, where icy creatures threaten the kingdom—and your rule. But in a world where battles are fought with both swords and seduction, your choices and connections will decide the fate of the realm… and your own.

Get ready for even hotter scenes, deeper political intrigue, and more ways to indulge your desires. Form alliances, seduce powerful rulers and wicked sorceresses, tame fierce warrior women, and uncover secrets in a world where even ice can burn with passion.

Sex of Thrones 2 brings next-level 3D visuals and ultra-realistic animations that make every moment feel alive. In this game, pleasure is power, temptation is a weapon, and survival depends on how well you play the game—both in and out of bed.

Features:
  • 🔥 More Adult Content – Hotter scenes, new mechanics, and more ways to rule with pleasure.
  • ❄️ A Deadly New Threat – The Ice Horde – Ancient creatures from the North that will shake up the game and force tough choices.
  • 👑 Politics & Seduction – Use power, cunning, or sheer sexual dominance to get what you want.
  • 💋 New Stunning Characters – From sultry queens to mysterious witches, every encounter can change your destiny.
  • 🌎 A Living, Reactive World – Your actions shape the fate of cities, kingdoms, and entire civilizations.

Will you conquer with fire or freeze under the pressure? Your choices will decide in Sex of Thrones 2!

data.short_description: Sex of Thrones 2 takes you to the frozen North, where ice creatures threaten the kingdom. Use seduction, power, and strategy to survive. Form alliances, conquer new lovers, and shape the fate of the realm in this immersive, adult visual novel.🔥❄️👑
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
